response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His 10+ years of diverse engineering experience, open-source contributions, and process-oriented mindset (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews) exceed the role’s expectations, though his German language limitation and lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions are minor gaps.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks are used
German language proficiency is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Resume lists DLang and Java prominently but lacks detail on Kotlin or Python usage
